## 1. Hardware

| os | Windows 10 |

| cpu_cores_logical | 24 |
| ram_gb | 127.4 |
| gpu | NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti, 16303 MiB |
| python | 3.11.9 |

## 2. Solvers & versions

- **OR-Tools**: `9.15.6755` (CP-SAT baseline)
- **INTELAG solvers** (8): `first-order`, `gpu-pdlp`, `lp`, `lp-barrier`, `lp-concurrent`, `lp-numerics`, `milp`, `sdp`
- Continuous-relaxation solvers report an **LP lower bound**, not the integer-schedule cost (labelled *LP-bound* in the tables).

## 5. OR-Tools comparison (per budget)

**Time budget = 30 s**

| Solver | Objective | Basis | vs OR-Tools | Mem avg (MB) | Mem max (MB) | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| first-order | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 67.4 | 89.1 | FEASIBLE |
| gpu-pdlp | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 201.1 | 208.8 | FEASIBLE |
| lp | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 63.1 | 89.4 | FEASIBLE |
| lp-barrier | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 72.2 | 95.1 | FEASIBLE |
| lp-concurrent | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 70.7 | 99.1 | FEASIBLE |
| lp-numerics | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 71.1 | 90.4 | FEASIBLE |
| milp | 459,750 | integer | +1.5% | 98.3 | 178.8 | FEASIBLE |
| or-tools | 453,050 | integer | +0.0% | 87.1 | 166.5 | OPTIMAL |
| sdp | 465,750 | LP-bound | +2.8% | 65.0 | 89.6 | FEASIBLE |
